Notice And Motion To Dismiss Class Action Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Daniel Berko, Esq., Law Office of, (415) 771-6174, for Plaintiff.

No other appearances.

RE: PLAINTIFF JAMES HILL's Motion To Dismiss Class Action Claims Without Prejudice.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss the class action claims without prejudice" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
